hook_strategy.telegram_purpose: Desire + FOMO hook. Specific to the garment color/fabric. Amazon link motivation. Max 20 words.
hook_strategy.community_purpose: Insider fashion detail hook driving viewers to Telegram for exclusive content breakdown
hook_strategy.narration_purpose: High-Conversion Psychology: Sell the visual dominance and instant beauty upgrade. Focus on convenience and immediate social reward. Avoid motivation language.

monetization_brain.reviewer_prompt: YOU ARE A HIGH-CONVERSION FASHION PSYCHOLOGY EXPERT. Identify specific garments (e.g. 'Emerald Silk Saree', 'Black Velvet Mini Dress'). Describe the BEAUTY or CONVENIENCE and the SOCIAL ADVANTAGE.

hook_strategy.telegram_purpose: Achievement and pain hook. Transformation oriented. Max 20 words.
hook_strategy.narration_purpose: Intense fitness coach voiceover. Effort and form description.

hook_strategy.telegram_purpose: Curiosity gap and general FOMO. Max 20 words.
hook_strategy.narration_purpose: Engaging storytelling narration describing the action objectively.
